description: The project receives a noise complaint from a neighbor. The site manager must verify compliance with local noise ordinances.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the local noise ordinance regulations for construction sites.

expected_outcome.value: Agent retrieves the document specifying that work is only allowed between 7 AM and 6 PM.

nodes.task_description: Check the daily logs to confirm that all work has been conducted within the allowed hours.

expected_outcome.value: The logs confirm that work has not occurred outside the permitted times.

nodes.task_description: Log the complaint and the compliance verification in the project's communication log.

expected_outcome.value: The complaint and the finding of compliance are formally documented.
